title: Uv light box
abstract: An UV light box is adapted for subjecting an object (C1) to UV irradiation, which UV light box (1) comprises a housing with a door (21) in front of a door opening (10), and a source of UV light (48). The UV light box (1) comprises a disinfecting chamber (30) with an access opening (34). The door (21) is adapted for being displaced in front of the door opening (10) to allow inserting an object (C1) to be irradiated by UV light and to take the irradiated object (C2) out again after a selected irradiation period, respectively. The UV light box (1) further comprises means for displacing the door (21), means for controlling operation of the UV light box (1), and at least one UV light source (48).
claims:
Claims Claims 1. An UV light box adapted for subjecting an object (Cl) to UV irradiation, which UV light box (1) comprises a housing with a door (21) in front of a door opening (10), and a source of UV light (48), characterised in that the UV light box (1) comprises a disinfecting chamber (30) with an access opening (34), the door (21) is adapted for being displaced in front of the door opening (10) to allow inserting an object (Cl) to be irradiated by UV light and to take the irradiated object (C2) out again after a selected irradiation period, respectively, means for displacing the door (21), means for controlling operation of the UV light box (1), and at least one UV light source (48). 2. An UV light box (1) according to claim 1, characterised in that one or more of the interior surfaces of the UV light box (1) is adapted to reflect UV light, preferably reflect UVC light, preferably the source of UV light, such as UVC light, includes at least one UV light lamp (4a,48b,48c,48d,48e,48f), preferably at least one UV light lamp suspended on an interior surface of the UV light box (1) not being the door (21), preferably the source of UV light includes at least two UV light lamps (48c,48d) mounted at an interior surface of the UV light box (1) below the disinfecting chamber (30), two UV light lamps (48a,48b) mounted above the disinfecting chamber, and one UV light lamp (48e,48f) at each opposite exterior side of the disinfecting chamber (30). 3. An UV light box (1) according to claims 1 or 2, characterised in that the at least one UV light source (48) is an UVC light source, wherein the majority of the UVC 

 light of the source of UVC light has a wavelength of about 250 nm - 280 nm, preferably in the range 254 - 270 nm, most preferred 254 nm using UVC light tubes and 265 using UVC LED. 4. An UV light box (1) according to any of claims 1, 2 or 3 characterised in that the means for displacing the door (21) includes one or more of at least one electric motor (22), a hoisting means and a lowering means for the door (21), preferably said hoisting means and said lowering means are positioned inside the housing, and guide means adapted for guiding the movement of the door (21) during its displacing, preferably opposite guiderails (18,19) or guide tracks for slidingly accommodating the opposite free edges of the door (21) for guiding the door (21) when it moves up and down in front of the door opening (10). 5. An UV light box (1) according to claim 4, characterised in that the hoisting means comprises a first reel (55) arranged at an interior first top front corner (56) of the housing, a second reel (57) arranged at an interior second top front corner (58) of the housing opposite the first reel (55), a first string (52) that runs on the first reel (55) has an upper first string end (52a) secured to a first top door corner (54) and an opposite lower first string end (52b) secured to a first weight (50), and a second string (53) that runs on the second reel (57) has an upper second string end (53a) secured to a second top door corner (56) and an opposite lower second string end (53b) secured to a second weight (51). 6. An UV light box (1) according to claims 4 or 5, characterised in that the lowering means comprises a third string (59) that has an upper third string end (59a) secured to an interior surface (60) of the door (21) and an opposite lower third string end (59b) secured to a reeling mechanism (23) provided at the bottom of the housing, which reeling mechanism (23) preferably is driven by or associated with the at least one electric motor (22). 7. An UV light box (1) according to any of the preceding claims 1 - 6, characterised in that the means for controlling operation of the UV light box (1) includes one or more of - at least one door opening sensor (61) accessible from outside the housing to trigger actuation of the lowering means, preferably the at least one door opening sensor (61) is contactless, - at least one door closing sensor (61) accessible from outside the housing to trigger actuation of the hoisting means, optionally the door opening sensor (61) and the door closing sensor (61) are the same, - at least one electrical contact, such as a micro switch (25), provided at a top region of the housing, which at least one micro switch (25) is arranged actuable by contact with the door (21) to close an electric circuit to start or stop any of the hoisting means and the lowering means, - optionally irradiation by the UV light source (48) is provided automatically in response to actuation of the at least one electrical contact, or the irradiation by the UV light is triggered by an UV light actuator (62), which preferably is a contactless sensor, optimally the UV light actuator is the same as the at least one door opening sensor (61;62), 

 - a timer means for setting the selected irradiation period, optionally the timer means also shuts off the at least one UV light source (48), - optionally a display (63) to monitor progress of the irradiation time from outside the housing, and - a microprocessor for controlling one or more of said components. 8. An UV light box (1) according to any of the preceding claims 1 - 7, characterised in that the housing comprises at least an exterior casing (2) and a disinfections chamber (30) insertable or inserted into the upper part (9) of the exterior casing (2). 9. An UV light box (1) according to claim 8, characterised in that the UV light box (1) further comprises one or more of an intermediate casing (29) arranged to be accommodated inside the exterior casing (2), that the disinfection chamber (30) is insertable or inserted inside a top part of the intermediate casing (29) with a circumferential gap (45) to said intermediate casing (29), and with its access opening (34) aligned with the door opening (10), preferably the intermediate casing (29) has means (36,37) on opposites side walls for carrying the disinfecting chamber (30), and the UV light source (48) is arranged in said gap (45) mounted to any one of the exterior wall face of the disinfecting chamber (30) or the interior wall face of the intermediate casing (29). 10.An UV light box (1) according to claims 8 or 9, characterised in that the UV light box (1) further comprises a door module (14) which 

 is arranged insertable or is inserted aligned with an interior face of a front wall (3) of the exterior casing (2), has a door module opening (16) alignable with the door opening (10) of the exterior casing (2) and the access opening (34) to the disinfecting chamber (30), and includes one or more of the means for controlling operation of the UV light box (1), the hoisting means and the lowering means. 11.An UV light box (1) according to any of the preceding claims 1 - 10, characterised in that the walls of the disinfecting chamber (30) are nettings (46) or grid. 12.Use of the UV light box (1) according to any of the preceding claims 1 - 11 for killing microorganisms on non human objects, such as killing viruses and bacteria, or for fusing plastic components adhered together by means of UV light curable adhesives.
